title: McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Review of 2022 & 2023 Outlook
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Review of 2022 & 2023 Outlook
Given the numerous tax law changes in 2022, it’s important to stay up to date on the latest developments and their implications on your business.
In our soon to be released Tax Perspectives: Review of 2022 & 2023 Outlook report, we take stock of the last 12 months and look ahead to key legislative trends and developments that can have an impact on the year ahead. Please join us for more insight.
- Brett Anderson , Partner, National Tax Group, Calgary
- Randy Schwartz, Partner , National Tax Group, Toronto
- Erica Hennessey , Partner, National Tax Group, Calgary
- Mike Hegedus , Partner, National Tax Group, Calgary
- Jeremy Ho , Partner, National Tax Group, Vancouver
- Anu Koshal , Partner, National Tax Group, Toronto
- Adam Unick , Associate, National Tax Group, Calgary
For questions about this event please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca
This seminar may be eligible for Alberta CPA credits. More information can be found here: https://cpaalberta.ca/Members/CPD-Reporting
Note: This will take place in our Calgary office and will be given in English only. A lunch to suit most dietary concerns will be served.
12:00 p.m. - 1:30 p.m. (MT)
